Package i5.cb.api.notification

Class NotificationParser

  • java.lang.Object
    • i5.cb.api.notification.NotificationParser
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    NotificationParserConstants

    public class NotificationParser
extends java.lang.Object
implements NotificationParserConstants
    parses notification sent from a ConceptBase server
  • First, construct a NotificationParser object:
    NotificationParser parser = new NotificationParser( System.in );
  • Second, call the function that parses up to the nonterminal symbol you are expecting, generally Notification. Notification notification = parser.notification();
  • If you want to go on parsing, just repeat calling the function corresponding to the appropiate nonterminal. For a list of all nonterminals, see the grammar of notifications
